title: Vital statistics: births and deaths | Stats NZ
content:
## Vital statistics: births and deaths
27 February 2018, 10:45am
Download two modules of vital statistics (births and deaths), each with tables at regional levels for calendar years 1999 to 2017. Vital statistics come from births and deaths registered each year and are part of the major demographic indicators for New Zealand's population.

## Download births data
Births module 1999–2017 (Excel, 9 sheets, 478 KB)
Data on New Zealand resident live births:
- by period, sex, and region of residence and by child's ethnicity
- confinements by period and region of mother's residence resulting in single and multiple births
- by period and region of mother's residence and mother's age group
- for New Zealand residents and overseas visitors
- by period, major regions of mother's residence, and mother's and father's ethnicity
- by mother's residence at area unit level
- by major regions of mother's residence, and mother's and father's birthplace.

## Download deaths data
Deaths module 1999–2017 (Excel, 312 KB)
Data on New Zealand resident deaths:
- by period, sex, and residence of deceased, and by ethnic group (total responses)
- by period and marital status, and age group
- by period and residence of deceased at area unit level
- by period and residence of deceased major regions, and by sex and age group
- by occurrence year and month
- for New Zealand residents and overseas visitors.
- Statistics for university staff and students 13 January 2021
